data.body: REUSE (op-cert drift, 2026-07-13): the identity epic shipped the merge-gate as .github/workflows/verify-identity.yaml — it walks the MERGED LOG and grandfathers via ENFORCE_SINCE. Re-scope this story to add an op-cert verification lane to / mirror that gate, reusing the merged-log walk + grandfathering, rather than standing up a parallel walker. See proposal comment on epic sonic-columned-sturgeon.
